headline: No meetings, emails, or Slack activity today — use this clear calendar day to push forward on the two open Evals UX tickets before month-end.

quick_wins.task: Triage AE-1079: outline the 'no ground truth' design doc for generated evaluations
quick_wins.why: It's still in To Do — even a 20-min skeleton draft moves it to In Progress and unblocks design review

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake integrations (check env vars / credentials)
quick_wins.why: Both data sources are failing auth — you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.task: Advance AE-744: Justification + Actual vs Expected Evaluation Run results UX for all Evaluators
must_make_progress.why: Major priority, already In Progress — April closes today, make sure this is on track for 26.4 deliverables

must_make_progress.task: Draft or outline AE-1079 design doc for generated evaluations without ground truth
must_make_progress.why: Evals adoption is a key OKR pillar under Agents; clarifying this design unlocks the next sprint's work

must_communicate_with.person_or_team: Engineering lead on Evals (likely Adrian or team)
must_communicate_with.about: AE-744 status check — confirm UX mocks are aligned and any blockers before month-end
Salesforce and Snowflake credential failures — need access restored to monitor escalations and metrics

must_report_status.topic: Evals UX progress (AE-744) and Generated Evaluations design (AE-1079)
must_report_status.note: Month-end is today — proactively share status so it's captured in any April wrap-up

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations.
Snowflake metrics are down (empty password) — cannot track agents-in-production or evals adoption telemetry.
Today is April 30 (month-end / likely sprint boundary) — confirm any deliverables that must be recorded this month.
AE-744 has no due date set — consider adding one to signal urgency to the team.
AE-1079 is still in To Do — risk of it slipping if not picked up soon.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today — priority is restoring observability (Salesforce/Snowflake) and advancing evals UX which directly supports the 26.4 Agents release.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics are currently unobservable due to Snowflake outage; advancing AE-744 and AE-1079 are the primary adoption-driving work items for the evals pillar.

slack_summary: Clear calendar day — no meetings, emails, or Slack activity overnight. Top priorities: push AE-744 (Evals UX) forward and start the AE-1079 design doc before month-end. Both Salesforce and Snowflake integrations are broken, so flag IT to restore access. Zero meetings today — protect the deep work time.
